title: Blood Creek Woodsman
overview: The small Oregon town of Oak Creek was shaken to the core when logger Bud Kindrick lost his mind and went on a killing spree after discovering a terrible secret. Now, nearly a year later, the killings have begun again and echo those committed by Kindrick, who had been dubbed the Blood Creek Woodsman. The town Sheriff, his estranged wife, his deputy and a pushy reporter must get to the bottom of what's going on while the bodies pile up around them.
